title: The Red Dance
writer: Henry Leyford Gates, Eleanor Browne, Pierre Collings
actors: Dolores Del Río, Charles Farrell, Ivan Linow
plot: Just before the Russian Revolution, Tasia, a young peasant girl, is ordered to kill the Grand Duke Eugen, considered an enemy by the revolutionaries, on the eve of his marriage to Princes Varvara. Because Tasia has fallen in love ...
